modelPurpose: Produce a transparent annual national retail-market estimate from supplied, cited inputs without adding alternative methods together.

currencyPolicy.note: All monetary inputs in one record must already use the declared output currency. Any external currency conversion must be supplied as a cited upstream transformation.

direct_reported_value.label: Direct reported annual market value
direct_reported_value.notes: Use only when the cited metric matches the record's national, annual, product and retail-value scope.

taxable_volume_price_basket.label: Taxable volume multiplied by a retail price basket
taxable_volume_price_basket.formula: taxable volume × retail price per declared unit × scope adjustment factor
taxable_volume_price_basket.notes: The taxable-volume unit and price denominator must be identical. The adjustment factor must be explicit even when it is 1.

excise_backsolve_price_basket.label: Realised excise back-solved to volume and priced at retail
excise_backsolve_price_basket.formula: (realised excise revenue ÷ excise rate per unit) × retail price per unit × scope adjustment factor
excise_backsolve_price_basket.notes: Do not use a combined tax account unless the cited input isolates the relevant products or the adjustment range explicitly reflects the allocation uncertainty.

customs_apparent_consumption_retail.label: Customs apparent consumption converted to retail value
customs_apparent_consumption_retail.formula: max(0, imports value + domestic production value − exports value) × retail markup factor × scope adjustment factor
customs_apparent_consumption_retail.notes: All flow inputs must use the same valuation basis. Domestic production and exports must be explicit, including a cited zero where appropriate. Customs value is not consumer sales.

active_users_annual_spend.label: Active users multiplied by annual spend
active_users_annual_spend.formula: active users × annual spend per active user × scope adjustment factor
active_users_annual_spend.notes: The active-user definition, age range and usage period must match the spending measure.

usage_units_price.label: Users multiplied by annual product usage and retail prices
usage_units_price.formula: active users × Σ(disjoint component share × annual units per user × retail price per unit) × scope adjustment factor
usage_units_price.notes: Every component must represent a disjoint revenue scope. Overlapping representations such as liquid already contained in pods must not be added twice.

comparable_country_scaling.label: Comparable-country scaling
comparable_country_scaling.formula: median across comparables of (comparable market value ÷ comparable scale base) × target scale base × comparability adjustment factor
comparable_country_scaling.notes: Comparable countries must be distinct from the target and use the same market definition, currency basis or an externally documented conversion, and scale metric.

external_global_sanity_check.label: External global or regional market-share sanity check
external_global_sanity_check.formula: external benchmark market value × target-country share
external_global_sanity_check.notes: This result is displayed as a cross-check and is never included in the primary consensus.
